name: 10" Lit-Led Red Star Projects Gingerbread/Candy Cane/Snowflakes Christmas Tree Topper - Wondershop™
description:
Create a magical and festive ambiance in your home with this 4 Lit-Led Star Projects Gingerbread Boy/Girl Candy Cane Christmas Treetop from Wondershop™. This Christmas tree topper features a red hue with all-over sparkly detailing to bring extra excitement to your seasonal holiday decorations. Attach to the top of the Christmas tree, plug it in, and project a gingerbread boy/girl candy cane on the wall to create a warm Christmas atmosphere.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
